meaning: adj.[鍖籡榛戣川绾圭姸浣撶殑
examples: The reduced nigrostriatal uptake seen on imaging in 10 of the 21 patients indicated dopamine transporter dysfunction.
Serial dopamine transporter imaging of nigrostriatal function in patients with idiopathic rapid-eye-movement sleep behaviour disorder: a prospective study.
There is increasing evidence that, in addition to its function as the main neurotransmitter in the nigrostriatal pathway, dopamine may be neurotoxic in certain conditions.
